title: Frequently Asked Questions - Implementation — How do I configure a follow-up encounter
body: You can create a follow-up by creating a new encounter type. If you want it to be scheduled at a particular point in time, it can be done through the Visit Schedule Rule. You can find the Visit Schedule rule in the "Rules" section of a form. You can navigate to the form either through the "Forms" section of the App Designer or through the "Encounter Types"/"Programs"/"Subject Types" section of the Admin section.
